title: coupon — realtime broadcast channels
description: Two broadcast channel families. Tenant-level for admin dashboards (coupon lifecycle + redemption stream); redemption-specific for real-time redemption ledger visibility on the coupon-detail screen. Reverb (Laravel Reverb) is the default transport; the notifications module handles fanout.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.coupons
channels.description: Tenant-wide coupon lifecycle stream. Sink for admin dashboards. Broadcasts coupon lifecycle events (created / activated / deactivated / expired / usage_cap_reached) plus the redemption + clawback stream at aggregate level.
channels.notes: Payload trimmed to non-confidential fields (see data-classes.json). Confidential fields (discount_amount, usage_cap, minimum_order_amount) are omitted for readers without coupons.view-financials — the frontend re-fetches the full detail via HTTP when a user with financial permission drills in.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.coupon-redemptions
channels.description: High-volume redemption + refusal stream. Powers the real-time redemption ledger on the coupon-detail screen + the fraud-triage view. Opt-in per user via settings.notify_on_every_redemption — most tenants unsubscribe.
channels.notes: Higher throughput than the tenant.{id}.coupons channel because it carries the full redemption stream + refusals. Refusal events fire on every rate-limited attempt too — useful for real-time fraud pattern detection.
